capabilities.label: Spatial audio
capabilities.note: As of July 2026 no dedicated Swift package serves spatial audio — we swept the full package index for ambisonics, binaural, HRTF, Atmos, and head-tracking wrappers and found none. Apple's own frameworks are the path: PHASE for game/interactive scenes, AVAudioEnvironmentNode for 3D positioning in AVAudioEngine, and CMHeadphoneMotionManager for head tracking.
